scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:mobile && npm run install:site
scripts.dev: cd site && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run dev
scripts.build: cd site && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build && cp -r dist ../dist
scripts.build:dev: cd site && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build:dev && cp -r dist ../dist
